title: rochefortia acanthophora
intro: Rochefortia acanthophora, also known as the Mexican sage or cat's whisker, is a plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting digestion. Rochefortia acanthophora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
